summary: Planned a narrow repair path for canonical PR #92902. No GitHub mutations are planned because comments, labels, close, merge, force-push, and bypasses are blocked; the executable output is a repair-contributor-branch fix artifact that preserves @YonganZhang credit and targets the failing replacement-channel schema proof.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #92902 so replacement channel config schema ownership is deterministic and the Real behavior proof for #92884 passes. Keep the patch focused on channel config metadata and regression coverage, preserving @YonganZhang attribution.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(config): repair replacement channel schema ownership
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair #92902 so replacement channel plugins that declare `preferOver` keep active channel config schema ownership deterministically.
- Keep the fix scoped to channel config metadata ordering/ownership and the replacement Slack schema regression proof for #92884.
- Preserve @YonganZhang's contribution from source PR #92902.

Fixes: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/92884
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92902
Credit: based on @YonganZhang's contributor PR #92902.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts src/plugins/channel-plugin-ids.test.ts src/cli/config-cli.test.ts src/config/runtime-schema.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Real behavior proof for #92902
- `/review`
credit_notes: Repair PR body and merge notes must credit @YonganZhang and identify #92902 as the source PR.
Preserve the intended behavior from #92902: replacement channel plugins declaring preferOver keep ownership of active channel config schemas.
